summary: Full testing complete for Apna Counselor (major rewrite from PathFinder). Backend: 100% passing (12/12 tests). Frontend: All features verified - Welcome screen, login, dashboard with quick actions, colleges tab with 12 real colleges, type filters, college detail pages with cutoffs/placements/branches, college predictor (rank-based), compare feature, and 5-tab navigation all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: App successfully renamed to 'Apna Counselor' throughout
12 real Indian engineering colleges seeded with actual data (IITs, NITs, BITS, IIIT, DTU, VIT)
College predictor uses real JEE rank data to match against cutoffs
All college endpoints properly implemented: list, filter by type, detail, predict, compare, cutoffs
5 mentors and 2 batches still working from previous iterations
Frontend properly displays college data with NIRF ranks, fees, placements, cutoffs
College detail page shows branch-wise cutoffs table, placements 2024, branches offered
Predictor screen accepts JEE rank and returns matching colleges with probability
Compare feature allows side-by-side comparison of up to 4 colleges
5-tab navigation working: Home, Mentors, Colleges, AI Chat, Profile
All API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
All interactive elements have proper testID attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data: 12 colleges (IIT Bombay, Delhi, Madras, Kanpur, KGP, NIT Trichy, Warangal, Surathkal, BITS Pilani, IIIT Hyderabad, DTU, VIT), 2 students (rohan@student.com, ananya@student.com), 5 mentors, 2 batches from backend seed_data() function.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apna Counselor fully tested and working. Major rewrite from PathFinder - courses feature removed, colleges feature added. All 12 backend endpoints passing. Frontend fully functional with welcome screen, login, dashboard (quick actions + Top Colleges carousel), colleges tab (12 colleges with type filters), college detail pages (cutoffs/placements/branches), college predictor (rank-based), compare feature, and 5-tab navigation. No issues found.

test_categories.colleges: 7/7 passed - list (12 colleges), filter by IIT (5 colleges), detail (IIT Bombay), invalid ID (404), predict (rank 5000), compare (IIT Bombay + Delhi), cutoffs
test_categories.auth: 2/2 passed - login with rohan@student.com and ananya@student.com

all_endpoints_verified: GET /api/colleges/iit-bombay - returns full college detail with cutoffs

screens_tested: Welcome screen - Shows 'Apna Counselor' title, Get Started and Sign In buttons
Login screen - Email/password form with student credentials working
Dashboard - User greeting, AI Assistant card, 4 quick actions (College Predictor, Find Mentors, Browse Colleges, Compare), Top Mentors section, Top Colleges carousel, Batch Programs section
Colleges tab - 12 colleges displayed, Predict button, search bar, type filters (All, IIT, NIT, IIIT, Private, State), Compare Colleges card

College detail page - NIRF rank badge, college info, key stats (fee, package, students, faculty, campus), highlights, branch-wise cutoffs table, placements 2024, branches offered, Check My Chances button
Predictor screen - Exam selection (JEE Mains, JEE Advanced), category selection (General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS), rank input, predict button, results display with probability
Compare screen - College selection grid, compare button, comparison table
Mentors tab - Mentor list with search and filters
AI Chat tab - AI Assistant interface
Profile tab - User info (Rohan Gupta), role badge (STUDENT), academic details (12th, JEE Mains, 95%, AIR 8500), interests, budget, location
user_flows_tested: Dashboard → Colleges tab → College detail → Predictor → Results (WORKING)
Colleges tab → Filter by IIT → 5 IITs displayed (WORKING)
Colleges tab → Compare Colleges → Selection screen (WORKING)
5-tab navigation: Home ↔ Mentors ↔ Colleges ↔ AI Chat ↔ Profile (WORKING)
frontend_test_details.integration_status: All frontend-backend integrations working. Login returns JWT token. Dashboard loads colleges from /api/colleges. Colleges tab filters by type. College detail loads from /api/colleges/{id}. Predictor calls /api/colleges/predict with rank. Compare calls /api/colleges/compare with college IDs.
frontend_test_details.testID_coverage: All interactive elements have proper testID attributes: login-btn, get-started-btn, login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn, quick-college-btn, quick-mentors-btn, quick-sessions-btn, quick-profile-btn, dash-college-{idx}, predictor-btn, college-search, type-{type}, college-{idx}, compare-btn, college-back, predict-for-college, pred-back, rank-input, predict-btn, result-{idx}, compare-back, sel-{idx}, do-compare-btn, reset-compare
